programme.desc: On a frozen remote highway in the Canadian North, an Indigenous woman and her dog are hunted by a stranger in a semi truck.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brents finds a way to stop Oscar from saying the J-word, but discovers it might not have been so bad.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Hank and Davis lead the fight against a call center that might come to Dog River.

programme.title: Transplant
programme.desc: When Bashir "Bash" Hamed finds himself at the site of a tragic accident, his medical training takes over as he works to save the wounded.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered: A Tale of Three Letters
programme.desc: The Postables try to identify the intended recipients of a trio of dead letters which have a surprising, personal impact on all of them.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: The Movie
programme.desc: When their biggest rival, Humdinger, starts wreaking havoc as the mayor of Adventure City, Ryder and everyone's favorite heroic pups kick into high gear to face the challenge. Armed with exciting new gadgets and gear, the PAW Patrol joins forces with a savvy dachshund to save the citizens of Adventure City.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: The Mighty Movie
programme.desc: The PAW Patrol pups magically gain superpowers after a meteor strikes Adventure City. However, things take a turn for the worse when Humdinger and a mad scientist steal their powers and turn themselves into supervillains. As the team springs into action to save the city, Skye soon learns that even the smallest pup can make the biggest difference.

programme.title: An Optimist's Guide to the Planet
programme.desc: Nikolaj travels the world to meet people transforming waste into resources; showing that waste isn't something to hide -- it's something we can rethink as valuable raw material.

programme.title: Ready Jet Go: Space Camp: The Movie
programme.desc: Jet and his friends take their skills to Space Camp and experience an intergalactic adventure.

programme.title: Devotion
programme.desc: The inspirational true story of Jesse Brown, the first Black aviator in U.S. Navy history, and his enduring friendship with fellow fighter pilot Tom Hudner. Helping to turn the tide in the most brutal battle in the Korean War, their heroic sacrifices ultimately make them the Navy's most celebrated wingmen.

programme.title: Live and Let Die
programme.desc: When Bond (Roger Moore) investigates the murders of three fellow agents, he finds himself a target, evading vicious assassins as he closes in on powerful Kananga (Yaphet Kotto). Known on the streets as Mr. Big, Kananga is coordinating a global threat, using tons of self-produced heroin. As Bond tries to unravel the mastermind's plan, he meets Solitaire (Jane Seymour), a beautiful tarot-card reader

programme.title: The Forge
programme.desc: A year out of high school with no plans for his future, a boy is challenged by his single mom and a successful businessman to start charting a better course for his life. Through the prayers of his mother and biblical discipleship from his new mentor, he begins discovering God's purpose for his life is so much more than he could hope for or imagine.

programme.title: Adulthood
programme.desc: When siblings Noah and Megan find a long-buried corpse in their parents' basement, they stumble into a wildly escalating web of crime, cover-ups and murder. The deeper they dig, the harder it becomes to escape.

programme.title: Sorry, Baby
programme.desc: Something terrible happened to Agnes. But life goes on for everyone else. When a friend visits on the brink of an important milestone, Agnes realizes how stuck she's been, in this bittersweet story of finding your way after your world comes crashing down.

programme.title: The Housemaid
programme.desc: Hoping for a fresh start, a young woman becomes a live-in maid for a wealthy couple who harbor sinister secrets.

programme.title: Revival 69: The Concert That Rocked the World
programme.desc: A young concert promoter launches a festival in 1969 to revive the kings of rock 'n' roll and present new bands. John Lennon's performance with the Plastic Ono Band triggers him to leave the Beatles.

programme.title: Sweet Angel Baby
programme.desc: Eliza is an unassuming and beloved member of a small fishing community in Newfoundland who sees all of her relationships put in jeopardy after her secret social media persona is exposed.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Lacey is suspicious of the illegal duplication of Dog River money; Hank gets a case of pink eye, causing Brent and Wanda to panic in Corner Gas; Karen is frustrated with Davis.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Emma goes Christmas shopping early making everyone curious to find out what they are getting.

programme.title: Transplant
programme.desc: Bash's experience as a doctor in Syria informs his unconventional approach as he joins the staff at York Memorial.

programme.title: One Bad Apple: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
programme.desc: Hannah meets a new side of law and order as she investigates a murder.

programme.title: Air Bud: World Pup
programme.desc: The golden retriever helps his young owner (Kevin Zegers) and his coed soccer team to shine while outsmarting a wily dogcatcher.

programme.title: Air Bud: Seventh Inning Fetch
programme.desc: The golden retriever joins a middle-school baseball team and searches for his missing offspring.

programme.title: Chicago Fire

programme.title: Chicago Fire

programme.title: Godfather of Harlem
programme.desc: Bumpy plans to build a new club in Harlem but must find a way to finance it without the heroin business; Elise testifies in the Malcolm X murder trial when three innocent men are accused; Stella negotiates a business deal between Colombo and Chin.

programme.title: Godfather of Harlem
programme.desc: Bumpy must turn the Five Families against Chin when he violates their peace agreement; he tasks newcomer Frank Lucas with robbing a shipment of Gigante heroin; Elise learns of a plot to kill Omar; Stella makes a play to become boss of the family.

programme.title: Forensic Factor
